section_miscategorizations.reason: Ordering a diagnostic test is a management action and belongs in the Plan, not in the Assessment.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient has received both doses of the COVID-19 vaccine.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is past treatment/current vaccination status, a historical subjective item, not a new plan or order.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient is due for an MMR vaccine.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Being due for a vaccine is an assessment of preventive care status; the actual recommendation or order would belong in the Plan.
